data.name: Prince John

abilities.name: Beautiful, Lovely Taxes
abilities.text: {Exert} — Play an item from your hand or discard with cost 5 or less for free, exerted.

data.flavor_text: A villainous schemer from day to night.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Song of the Herd
abilities.text: For each song card in your discard, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

data.name: Nala
data.flavor_text:
The Lorcana Hide-and-Seek Championship was
hers for the taking.

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: One on the Way
abilities.text: During your turn, when you put a card into your inkwell, if it's the second card you've put into your inkwell this turn, you may draw a card.

data.name: Stitch

abilities.name: Heave Ho!
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may deal 2 damage to chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
He's not the biggest glimmer on the team, but he
still packs a wallop.

abilities.name: Not Without My Family
abilities.text: You can't play this character unless you have 5 or more characters in play.

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Stitch.)

abilities.name: Ready For Action
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you used Shift to play him, you may put an action card from your discard on the top of your deck.

keywords.name: Shift 2
keywords.text: (You may pay 2 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Aladdin.)

abilities.name: Remember Your Training
abilities.text: When you play this character, your characters get +2 {Strength} this turn.

data.name: Rescue Rangers Away!
rules: Count the number of characters you have in play. Chosen character loses {Strength} equal to that number until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Here's the Best Part
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may pay 2 {Ink} to have each opponent choose and discard a card.

data.name: Minnie Mouse

abilities.name: Land, Ho!
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may return a location card from your discard to your hand.

data.flavor_text:
Minnie leaned forward. Could it be true? Was this
the island at last?

abilities.name: Blades of Fury
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may banish chosen item. Its player gains 1 lore.

abilities.name: Quick Reflexes
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

abilities.name: Teeth and Ambitions
abilities.text: When you play this character, deal 2 damage to chosen character of yours to deal 2 damage to another chosen character.

abilities.name: I Was Born Ready
abilities.text: If you have another Hero character in play, this character gets +1 Lore.

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mickey Mouse.)

abilities.name: Mariner's Might
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, chosen Pirate character gets +2 {Strength} and gains "This character takes no damage from challenges" this turn.

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Winter Ambush
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character can't ready at the start of their next turn.

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: I'm Lovin' This
abilities.text: If an effect would cause you to discard one or more cards, you don't discard.

abilities.name: Who's Next?
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you pay 2 {Ink} less for the next Puppy character you play this turn.

abilities.name: Don't Be Afraid
abilities.text: Your Puppy characters gain Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

abilities.name: I Won't Let You Down
abilities.text: This character can challenge ready characters.

abilities.name: Enormous Responsibility
abilities.text: While this character has damage, he gets +2 {Strength}.

data.name: Snow White

abilities.name: Hidden Away
abilities.text: This character can't be challenged.

data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
data.flavor_text: A true heart can thwart many an evil scheme.

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Hiro Hamada.)

abilities.name: You Can Be Way More
abilities.text: Your Floodborn characters that have a card under them gain Evasive and Ward. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them. Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Hiro Hamada.)

abilities.name: You Can Be Way More
abilities.text: Your Floodborn characters that have a card under them gain Evasive and Ward. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them. Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.name: Lilo

abilities.name: No Place I'd Rather Be
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if this card is in your discard, you may play her and she enters play exerted.

data.flavor_text: "You can't keep me away from the fun!"

data.name: Moana
data.flavor_text:
Moana receives a call from the ancestors to sail
to new skies and reconnect people across the
entire ocean.

data.name: Vaiana
data.flavor_text:
Vaiana receives a call from the ancestors to sail
to new skies and reconnect people across the
entire ocean.

abilities.name: Happy Helper
abilities.text: While this character has no damage, he gets +2 {Strength} and gains Support. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Pack of Her Own
abilities.text: Whenever you play a character, this character gets +1 {Strength} this turn.

abilities.name: Take the Lead
abilities.text: While this character has 3 {Strength} or more, she gets +2 {Lore}.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Safe Passage
abilities.text: Whenever one of your Ally characters quests, you may remove up to 2 damage from this character.

data.name: Patch

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: Puppy Barking
abilities.text: While you have another Puppy character in play, this character gets +1 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text: Sand sure was more fun than it looked!

data.name: Pull the Lever!
rules:
Choose one:
• Draw 2 cards.
• Each opponent chooses and discards a card.

abilities.name: Dark Power
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card. If an Illusion character card is discarded this way, you may play that character for free.

abilities.name: Dark Power
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card. If an Illusion character card is discarded this way, you may play that character for free.

abilities.name: You Don't Need That
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may banish chosen item.

abilities.name: Now, That's Not Bad
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever an item is banished, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: True Valor
abilities.text: This character gets +1 {Strength} for each 1 damage on her.
